title: eryngium maritimum
intro: Eryngium maritimum, also known as sea holly, is a perennial flowering plant native to coastal regions in Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eryngium maritimum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Eryngium maritimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusinate, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
